EmailTemplate.description: Used to notify the new owner of a WTP
EmailTemplate.name: WTP_DPM New Owner Notification
EmailTemplate.subject: You have been assigned to this WTP
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hello {!Case.OwnerFirstName},
Please note that the WTP: {!Case.CaseNumber} has been assigned to you by {!Case.LastModifiedBy}. You can reveiew it at the following link: {!Case.WTP_Link__c} .
This email is automatically generated. Please do not respond to this email.
